descriptionShort: Profile of Richmond Sockeyes coach Orland Kurtenbach balancing coaching with his insurance and golf driving range businesses.
descriptionLong: Orland Kurtenbach, the first member of the NHL Canucks in 1970, juggles three major commitments: coaching the Richmond Sockeyes junior team, building his insurance business in New Westminster, and developing a golf driving range in Surrey. The 50-year-old, working 8 a.m. to midnight most days, was recruited by team owner Bruce Taylor in July. Despite initial reluctance due to his other business obligations, Kurtenbach accepted the coaching position, having missed involvement in hockey.
